message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_06-41-11_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_06-41-11_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Update implementation: 
- First-insurance surcharge (+10% of policyBase) ALWAYS applies (independent of previousContracts)
- Follow-up discount (-15% of policyBase) applies if previousContracts >= 1
- Loyalty discount (-20% of policyBase) applies if yearsWithMHPCO >= 2
- Curse, high-enchantment item surcharges as before

Make all currently activated tests pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously.

content.text: I'll analyze the current state of the test and implementation files, then update the implementation to make all activated tests pass.

The current implementation uses `else if` for the follow-up discount, meaning first-insurance surcharge and follow-up discount are mutually exclusive. According to the new spec, first-insurance surcharge ALWAYS applies (independent of previousContracts), and follow-up discount applies when previousContracts >= 1. Let me check the test expectations to verify.

Looking at the multi-item test (line 156-165): cursed sword + amulet, yearsWithMHPCO=0, previousContracts=1
- policyBase = 100 + 60 = 160
- curse surcharge = 50
- first-insurance surcharge: +16 (10% of 160) - ALWAYS
- follow-up discount: -24 (15% of 160) - previousContracts >= 1
- fee = 5
- Total = 160 + 50 + 16 - 24 + 5 = 207 ✓

Let me verify the "follow-up contract" test (line 146-152): sword, yearsWithMHPCO=0, previousContracts=1
- policyBase = 100
- first-insurance: +10
- follow-up: -15
- fee = 5
- Total = 100 + 10 - 15 + 5 = 100 ✓

And the integration test (line 194-200): cursed sword enchantment 7, yearsWithMHPCO=3, previousContracts=1
- policyBase = 100
- curse: 50, high-ench: 30
- first-insurance: +10
- follow-up: -15
- loyalty: -20
- fee = 5
- Total = 100 + 50 + 30 + 10 - 15 - 20 + 5 = 160 ✓

Now let me make the minimal change.

content.text:
All 22 activated tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Changed first-insurance surcharge to ALWAYS apply (independent of previousContracts), and made follow-up discount apply independently when previousContracts >= 1.
- Result: All 22 activated tests pass (14 todos remain).
- Approach: Minimal change - removed the `else if` mutual exclusion by splitting the condition into two independent statements. First-insurance surcharge now applies unconditionally; follow-up discount applies when previousContracts >= 1.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_06-41-11_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
